markets.question: UFC Fight Night: Luana Carolina vs. Melissa Mullins (Women's Bantamweight, Prelims)
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Luana Carolina" if Luana Carolina is officially declared the winner of the fight against Melissa Mullins at UFC Fight Night: Evloev vs. Murphy, scheduled for March 21, 2026.

It will resolve to "Melissa Mullins" if Melissa Mullins is officially declared the winner.

If the fight is declared a draw or technical draw, ruled a No Contest, not scored, canceled, or postponed beyond April 4, 2026, this market will resolve "50-50."

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

markets.question: Fight to Go the Distance?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the fight between Luana Carolina and Melissa Mullins at UFC Fight Night: Evloev vs. Murphy, scheduled for March 21, 2026, goes the full scheduled number of rounds and the result is determined by the judges' scorecards. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No." 

Draws decided by the judges' scorecards after all scheduled rounds are completed will resolve "Yes." Technical decisions or technical draws declared before all rounds are completed will resolve "No."

If the bout is ruled a No Contest, not scored, canceled, or postponed beyond April 4, 2026, this market will resolve "50-50."

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

markets.question: Will the fight be won by KO or TKO?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the fight between Luana Carolina and Melissa Mullins at UFC Fight Night: Evloev vs. Murphy, scheduled for March 21, 2026, ends by KO or TKO, including referee stoppage, doctor stoppage, or corner stoppage. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No."

If the fight ends in a draw or by disqualification (either fighter), it will resolve "No."

If the bout is ruled a No Contest, not scored, canceled, or postponed beyond April 4, 2026, this market will resolve "50-50."

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

markets.question: O/U 0.5 Rounds
markets.description:
Each market will resolve to “Over” if the fight between Luana Carolina and Melissa Mullins at UFC Fight Night: Evloev vs. Murphy, scheduled for March 21, 2026, lasts beyond the listed round threshold.

Each market will resolve to “Under” if the fight between Luana Carolina and Melissa Mullins at UFC Fight Night: Evloev vs. Murphy, scheduled for March 21, 2026, does not last beyond the listed round threshold.

“Over 0.5 Rounds” will resolve “Yes” if the fight continues past the 2:30 mark of Round 1.

markets.question: Spread: RC Strasbourg Alsace (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming UEFA Europa Conference League game, scheduled for March 19 at 4:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "RC Strasbourg Alsace" if RC Strasbourg Alsace win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "HNK Rijeka".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on uefa.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

If the combined total is less than 3, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on uefa.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.
